sql:
SELECT o.id AS order_id, o.order_date, o.status AS order_status, 
       d.id AS delivery_id, d.delivery_date, d.status AS delivery_status, 
       b.id AS billing_id, b.billing_date, b.total_amount, b.status AS billing_status, 
       p.id AS payment_id, p.payment_date, p.amount AS payment_amount, p.method AS payment_method
FROM sales_orders o
LEFT JOIN deliveries d ON o.id = d.order_id
LEFT JOIN billing_documents b ON d.id = b.delivery_id
LEFT JOIN payments p ON b.id = p.billing_id
WHERE o.id = 7
LIMIT 50;
summary: No records were found for order 7.
